title: Kazakhstan says China's Xi to visit, in first foreign trip since pandemic
description: NUR-SULTAN — Chinese President Xi Jinping will visit Kazakhstan on Sept. 14, the Kazakh Foreign Ministry said on Monday, in what would be his first foreign…
